---
name: copy-quality-gate
description: "Use when: reviewing user-facing copy, localization quality, semantic correctness of labels, headings, and release-ready text before commit or deploy."
---

# Copy Quality Gate

Use this for any visible copy review before shipping.

## Checklist
1. Grammar and natural phrasing
2. Consistent terminology
3. Correct semantic meaning between text and data
4. Preserve required diacritics and language-specific characters
5. Check titles and summaries for misleading wording

## Done when
- No known language errors remain
- Labels match the underlying behavior or data
- Release-specific messages are present when required
